final:
module shift_register(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
    );

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (load)
            q <= d; // Load parallel data
        else
            q <= {1'b0, q[3:1]}; // Shift right
    end
endmodule
